user.title: Shelly 3EM Smart Monitor
user.description: Enter the host and port of the running Shelly 3EM Smart Monitor add-on (default: localhost:8080).

error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach the add-on at that address. Make sure it's running and the host/port are correct.

abort.already_configured: This add-on instance is already configured.

init.title: Tracked entities + energy sensors
init.description:
Tracked entities (on/off): when one of these flips, the add-on uses the timestamp to label power-step events. After 3 confident matches, the entity is auto-promoted to a device.

Energy sensors (kWh): the add-on imports the cumulative reading directly. Each one becomes a 'metered' device with authoritative energy values, so smart plugs with built-in measurement just show up as devices.

data.tracked_entities: On/off entities to teach the matcher
data.energy_entities: Energy sensors to import (sensor.* with device_class: energy)
